SELECT 
  1 as test_value,
  ' $container.$selectednamespace .8090.svc ' as host_pattern,
  CASE 
    WHEN position(' $container.$selectednamespace .8090.svc ', '.') > 0 
    THEN ' SUCCESS : Concatenation worked - contains dots '
    ELSE ' FAILED : Variables not properly concatenated '
  END as status,
  -- Simulate a real query that would use this pattern
  concat(' http : / / ', ' $container.$selectednamespace .8090.svc ', ' / metrics
